name: 云端远征 2
description: 完全随机、可扩展的无限平台跳跃实验场

publishPose.payload: { sequence: number, x: number, y: number, vy: number, cameraBottom: number, direction: number }

shoot.payload: { shotId: string, x: number, y: number, power: boolean }

hitEnemy.payload: { eventId: string, sequence: number, shotId: string, enemyId: string, damage: number }

stompEnemy.payload: { eventId: string, sequence: number, enemyId: string }

playerOutcome.payload: { eventId: string, sequence: number, outcome: 'shield' | 'death', reason: string }
